title: [FIRRTL][Parser] Memory port annotations are not properly attached
body:
I'm getting an error with a non-local annotation targeting a memory port.
```
circuit Qux: %[[
{
 "class":"test",
 "target":"~Qux|Qux/foo:Foo>memory.w"
}
]]
  module Qux:
    inst foo of Foo
  module Foo:
    mem memory:
      data-type => UInt<8>
      depth => 16
      reader => r
      writer => w
      readwriter => rw
      read-latency => 1
      write-latency => 1
      read-under-write => undefined
```
      
```
./bin/firtool --parse-only ./test.fir
./test.fir:1:1: error: 'firrtl.nla' op  operation with symbol: #hw.innerNameRef<@Foo::@memory> was not found
circuit Qux: %[[
^
./test.fir:1:1: note: see current operation: "firrtl.nla"() {namepath = [#hw.innerNameRef<@Qux::@foo>, #hw.innerNameRef<@Foo::@memory>], sym_name = "nla_1"} : () -> ()
```
